creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
The next problem is that changed file will have different checksum than recorder in pkg database so it will not be removed by 'pkg delete' and can cause warnings for 'pkg check'.
Is it possible to install this file in to /var/db/<something> , remove it from plist and add periodic script to update this file weekly?

It can be done like for GeoIP port (database should be updated by user)
